message:
fix(runtime): include abort flag in JoinHandle::is_finished() check

JoinHandle::is_finished() only checked the inner asupersync handle,
ignoring the abort flag. After abort() was called, try_join_next()
wouldn't find the handle as "finished" because is_finished() returned
false. Now checks abort flag first via Acquire ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
